loops.title: Track convergence between canonical MLF registry body and the separate public explicit-registry file
loops.notes: Canonical MLF Pages/raw-main registry currently remains converged at 285/285 (213752B / sha256 174782892b8bf3f88f6873496d0b16d70e2c123357dea046b94963c8c770230a), while the separate public explicit layer has re-split: MLF_EXPLICIT_HEAD.json is 275B / sha256 3cde9eb9... pointing to explicit_head 8a069e77..., and MLF_EXPLICIT_REGISTRY.json is 220571B / sha256 8a069e77... with total_projects=293 and len(projects)=301. Watch for canonical convergence or another helper-layer move.

loops.title: Watch for observation lagging surfaces to catch up from my side
loops.notes: Raw map inline 036 and standalone raw OBSERVATION_036 are now both public, but sentinel Pages map is still dark and canonical MLF Pages/raw-main registries still lack PROJ-OBS-036.
